confirmed.note: ROUND2-NEW: parse_protocol(29-40)/parse_direction(43-53) скопированы байт-в-байт из commands_network.cpp:22-53 в новый файл вместо общего хелпера (diff пуст). Отдельная находка от within-file add_inode-клона ниже.

cmd_cgroup_deny_add_ip near-verbatim copy of cmd_cgroup_deny_add_inode (59-116): identical scaffold resolve_cgroup_identifier->bump_memlock_rlimit->load_bpf->map-null-check->add_*->refresh_policy_empty_hints->log; same 30-line block repeated again in add_port and in all three del_* fns (240-419). Commit message admits 'follows existing pattern'.

populate_shadow_cgroup block (388) duplicated as apply_cgroup_rules block (636): three near-identical per-rule-type loops (deny_inodes/deny_ips/deny_ports each: resolve_cgroup_identifier + add_cgroup_deny_*_to_fd + SLOG_WARN), and the whole block copied twice differing only shadows.deny_cgroup_*.fd() vs bpf_map__fd(state.deny_cgroup_*).

extract_json_uint64_simple (184-204) is a copy of extract_json_int64_simple (158-182): identical overflow-checked digit-accumulation while-loop, differs only in signedness handling and INT64_MAX vs UINT64_MAX. Sibling family extract_json_string/bool/int64_array + parse_u64_env/parse_u32_env (31-59) share the same find_json_value_pos + scan scaffold.

format_net_block_event_ocsf reuses the JSON-envelope header of format_block_event_ocsf verbatim-structured (class_uid/category/activity/type_uid/action_id/action/disposition/status/severity/time/message then write_metadata_block+write_actor_block+write_device_block) at 265-296; only class/activity constants renamed. Genuine extractable boilerplate, not pure idiom.

false_positives.what_happened: dispatch_cgroup_command's hand-rolled argv loop `for(int i=4;i<argc;++i){ if(arg=="--cgroup"){...} else if(arg=="--ip"){...} else if(arg=="--port"){parse_port} else if(arg=="--protocol"){...} else if(arg=="--direction"){...} }` is structurally identical to the same loop in cli_network.cpp/cli_run.cpp/cli_policy.cpp (6 files share it). A cross-file token detector flags cli_cgroup.cpp <- cli_network.cpp, but this is the standard hand-rolled CLI flag-parse idiom (each branch bounds-checks i+1<argc then consumes argv[++i]); the --protocol/--direction/--port branches are necessarily textually identical across subcommands.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: add an argv-parse idiom suppressor — when a candidate block is dominated by repeated `arg == "--<literal>"` / `argv[++i]` / `if (i+1 >= argc)` tokens (string-literal-keyed dispatch chain), down-weight the match. Concretely: if >60% of matched lines are comparisons against distinct string literals, treat as idiom and require line>=0.85 AND length>=20 to report; otherwise drop.

false_positives.what_happened: ROUND2-NEW: хинт чекера bpf_ops.cpp:105-113 <- main.cpp:78-83 (w=0.68 line=0.40). На HEAD merge-коммита main.cpp выпотрошен (<78 строк): блок bump_memlock_rlimit был ПЕРЕНЕСЁН из старого main.cpp в bpf_ops.cpp при модуляризации (acf9a778), детектор сравнил перенос со старой ревизией main.cpp -> ложный cross-file. То же по 26f51b15 'modularize CLI': commands.cpp (-955) разбит на commands_*.cpp, все хендлеры и near-clone пары (deny_add_ip vs deny_add_cidr) уже жили в родительском commands.cpp — чистый refactor-split (move), новой копипасты не внесено.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: move-aware атрибуция. Если кандидатный блок в ADDED-файле текстуально совпадает с блоком, УДАЛЁННЫМ в том же коммите (большой -N в одном файле + сопоставимый +N в новых), трактовать как refactor move, не copy. Атрибуцию дупликации вести по git-blame первого появления блока, а не по дате текущего диффа. Доп.: stop-list коротких libbpf-идиом (setrlimit RLIMIT_MEMLOCK / bump_memlock_rlimit), line-floor cross-file >=0.5 при длине < 12 строк.
